1870690.name: Fantasy Grounds - Pathfinder RPG - GameMastery Map Pack: Dungeon Rooms
1870690.description:
Note:
This product is not eligible for a PDF discount from Paizo

Pathfinder Map Pack: Dungeon Rooms

Ancient halls whisper of the lost past, and only the bravest dare to seek their buried secrets! Paizo Publishing's latest Pathfinder Map Pack provides simple and elegant tools for the busy Game Master. These 5 x 8 map tiles can be positioned to form a variety of ominous dungeon rooms, or combined with tiles from 
Pathfinder Map Pack: Dungeon Corridors
 and 
Pathfinder Map Pack: Dungeon Dangers
 to create an enormous megadungeon.
Inside, you'll find 18 richly illustrated map tiles, including:
  • Battle-Scarred Hall
  • Columned Corner
  • Columned Vault
  • Crumbling Corner
  • Ruined Chamber
  • Side Gallery
Game Masters shouldn't waste their time sketching maps every time characters step into a dusty subterranean hall. With 

Pathfinder Map Pack: Dungeon Rooms , you'll always be ready no matter which way your adventurers turn!
While this product has been developed to be used for pathfinder 1, it is compatible with pathfinder 2.0, 5E and any other ruleset supported by Fantasy Grounds.
This product is not a PDF or accessible outside of Fantasy Grounds. It has been lovingly converted for use within Fantasy Grounds and features the following additions:
  • All maps resized and set up with a preset grid to make combats easy to manage
Adapted for Fantasy Grounds by: Wayne Arsenault
Requires: The free Fantasy Grounds virtual tabletop (VTT) software and any ruleset.
Screenshots may differ from what you see in-game based on the extension and ruleset you have loaded.
